name: Ambrosia Fruit
recipeIngredient: 1 can pineapple chunks in light syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving 1/4 cup juice in a saucepan. Set the drained pineapple aside.
2. Add the brown sugar and orange peel to the saucepan with the reserved juice. Heat until the sugar dissolves.
3. Peel and section the oranges into a large bowl. Add the diced apples and pineapple chunks to the bowl.
4. Pour the heated juice mixture over the fruit and gently stir.
5. Chill the fruit mixture.
6. Just before serving, sprinkle the coconut on top.
